content.en:
"Let's go!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

Taking advantage of Ye Tian's fight with the Dapeng projection creature, he could just try to escape from here.

With so many invincible Dao Ancestors united, there should be a way to break the blockade here and return to the outside world, as long as the Dapeng projection creatures don't come to stop them.

Immediately, the other invincible Dao Ancestors reacted and tried to break the blockade here at all costs.

Thundered!!!!

A temporary passage was punched out, and an invincible Dao Ancestor shuttled out of the isolated island.

In the blink of an eye, only Ye Tian and Dapeng projection creatures were left on the isolated island.

Without anyone else, and with the field of the Roc projection creatures enveloping the entire island, the power of the outside world could not extend in at all, so no one knew about the battle situation here.

Before, Ye Tian only resisted the Dapeng projection creatures, but did not attack.

But at the moment, he didn't need to hide.

"Dark Pole Spear!"

"Shadow Thorn!"

Ye Tian used the Forbidden Dao Technique to attack the Dapeng projection creatures again and again, the only thing that made him a little disappointed was that the stealth method turned out to be useless against the Dapeng projection creatures, and the other party easily gained insight into Ye Tian's forbidden talent hidden.

Of course, the Roc projection creature is not the main body after all, and the power is gradually being consumed, and it seems that it is difficult for the other party to replenish the strength.

Therefore, as long as it was consumed, Ye Tian would eventually be able to consume this Dapeng projection creature and thus take away the forbidden treasure.

Time passed little by little, although Ye Tian's injuries were getting more and more serious, but the Dapeng projection creatures were even more miserable, and they didn't show much strength, and they were no longer Ye Tian's opponents at all.

But just when Ye Tian was about to kill this Dapeng projection creature in one go, a mutation occurred.

I saw that the golden eyes of this projection creature of the Roc showed a human look, and a voice permeated this isolated island.

"Interesting little bugs, the realm is so low, but they can exert their strength not weakly, and there is a certain chance to grow to my level in the future!"

The roc projected the creature and said.

"Can you speak?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"What's the difficulty in speaking?" said with a smile, "It's just that I fought with you before because I didn't have a trace of spiritual consciousness, and now that a trace of my spiritual intelligence has descended, I can talk to you." Originally, I could have killed you at some cost, but you have good potential and are worth my investment. I will give you a chance, if you are in the dark forbidden realm in the future, you can come to me! Remember, my name is Peng Zu!"

After Peng Zu finished speaking, his golden eyes released a ray of light, and this light entered Ye Tian's body, and he didn't have time to dodge at all.

And after releasing this light, Peng Zu's projection disappeared.

The field that shrouded the isolated island gradually disappeared.

Ye Tian didn't have time to probe the light in his body, but immediately went to take away the black wood-like forbidden treasure.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the Divine Sense of the Invincible Dao Ancestor probed and saw Ye Tian, who was seriously injured, and they were all very shocked.

They thought that Ye Tian would fall, but they didn't expect Ye Tian to survive, and the Dapeng projection creature disappeared, and it was also believed that Ye Tian had killed the other party.

Suddenly, they were all impressed by Ye Tian's strength one by one.

In their opinion, Ye Tian was already not much worse than the weaker half-step domain ancestor.

"It's so surprising that the strength of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor is so strong, and it is the first time I know that the Supreme Dao Ancestor can raise his strength to this level!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor sighed.

Although Ye Tian was seriously injured, no one dared to snatch his forbidden treasure.

No matter how seriously injured a half-step domain ancestor is, he can easily kill an invincible Dao Ancestor, only the kind of invincible Dao Ancestor who is more against the sky can compete with the weaker half-step Domain Ancestor, but in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there are few invincible Dao Ancestors like that, at least there are few truly invincible Dao Ancestors who have been revealed so far.

Ye Tian did not linger here, but left quickly.

He was also afraid that there would be an accident, in case there was a half-step domain ancestor to deal with him, there would be no way to escape in his current state.

Soon, Ye Tian left this large forbidden treasure land and returned to the human world.

That's when he relaxed.

In the human realm, even a half-step domain ancestor couldn't attack it, so he was very safe.

Next, Ye Tian was healing his injuries while probing the situation of that light.

"Legacy!"

The message contained in this light is a legacy.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to fully accept this inheritance, and the whole person was completely excited.

"Extreme Inheritance!"

And this is the Extreme Path lineage that belongs to the practitioners!

He was very puzzled, the so-called Peng Ancestor should be a creature like a forbidden creature, and there was an extreme inheritance that belonged to a cultivator.

Maybe Peng Zu killed a powerful cultivator, or he traded it from other powerful cultivators, or even other circumstances.

The so-called Extreme Dao Inheritance is the inheritance of the Dao Ancestor level, which is of little value to the average Dao Ancestor, but for a Dao Ancestor like Ye Tian, the value of the Extreme Dao Inheritance is too great, and it can be called the greatest opportunity.

For a long time, Ye Tian believed that the invincible Dao Ancestor was the ultimate of the Dao Ancestor, and then he could only impact the half-step Domain Ancestor level.

And if you want to impact to the half-step domain ancestor level, you must master the forbidden path and complete the fusion of the forbidden path with your own avenue, just like Ye Tian's endless forbidden path.

Secondly, it is necessary to comprehend enough of the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor, so that the forbidden Dao power in the body contains the attributes of the domain power, thereby causing the qualitative change of the body, the qualitative change of the soul, and the qualitative change of the Dao power, and then step into the half-step Domain Ancestor level in one fell swoop.

But this is not the case with the Extreme Dao Inheritance, after reaching the Invincible Dao Ancestor, the Forbidden Body can be raised to the Ten Percent Great Perfection Realm, that is, the truly perfect Forbidden Body.

Secondly, it is also necessary to convert all the forbidden Dao power in the body into forbidden power, completely overriding the Dao power.

Finally, there is the most important soul.

Although the Dao Ancestor level attaches great importance to the soul, there is actually not much inheritance about the soul, but the soul is extremely important, it is the foundation of a person, it doesn't matter if the physical body is gone, but the soul can't be without.

The Extreme Path Inheritance is able to raise the soul to a level of near-immortality, referred to as the immortal soul.

The perfect forbidden body, the forbidden power, and the immortal soul are all condensed in all three aspects, and the power of the extreme path can be formed.

The invincible Dao Ancestor of the Extreme Dao Realm is the real Invincible Dao Ancestor, and after stepping into the half-step domain ancestor level in the future, he can easily step into the realm of all things, or even the realm of Unity, and the limit of an ordinary half-step Domain Ancestor is the Great Perfection of the Realm of Return.

But the Extreme Dao Inheritors are different, they also have a Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Extreme Dao Realm, and this half-step Domain Ancestor can counterattack the Battle Domain Ancestor.

And the half-step domain ancestors of the Great Perfection of the Unified Realm are all ants in front of the real domain ancestors, and this is where the gap between ordinary cultivators and extreme path cultivators lies.

But if you don't have the Extreme Dao inheritance, you don't want to step into the Extreme Dao level at all.

And now, Ye Tian has the Extreme Dao Inheritance!

As you can imagine, what a great opportunity!
